title: catha senegalensis
intro: Catha senegalensis, also known as khat or kat, is a flowering plant native to the Horn of Africa and the Arabian Peninsula. It has been used for centuries for its stimulant properties, containing the alkaloids cathinone and cathine, which are responsible for its medicinal and psychoactive effects. The health benefits of Catha senegalensis include improved mental clarity, increased alertness, and enhanced mood, making it a popular treatment for fatigue, stress, and depression. In traditional herbal medicine, Catha senegalensis is often prepared as a tea or chewed fresh, although its use is heavily regulated in many countries due to its potential for dependence and addiction.
